title: Share Your Views Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.
choices: intelligence
physician
ancient
rounds.answer: intelligence
rounds.explanation: intelligence: The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Not guilty of doing anything wrong; pure.
choices: intelligence
physician
innocent
rounds.answer: innocent
rounds.explanation: innocent: Not guilty of doing anything wrong; pure.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A great victory or success.
choices: physician
triumph
intelligence
rounds.answer: triumph
rounds.explanation: triumph: A great victory or success.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
rounds.answer: physician

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.answer: decent

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The act of going down or lowering.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: Her intelligence helped her solve the tricky problem.
The ancient castle has stood for hundreds of years.
The innocent puppy just wanted to play.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: Good enough or acceptable.
Not guilty of doing anything wrong; pure.
Something that happened not long ago.
The most important part or the middle of something.
rounds.answer: The most important part or the middle of something.
rounds.explanation: The central park is a great place to play.

choices: Exact and accurate; not vague.
Good enough or acceptable.
Related to the body or things you can touch and see.
Something that happened not long ago.
rounds.answer: Exact and accurate; not vague.
rounds.explanation: The teacher asked for a precise answer.

choices: Good enough or acceptable.
Not enough of something; hard to find.
Not guilty of doing anything wrong; pure.
Related to the body or things you can touch and see.
rounds.answer: Not guilty of doing anything wrong; pure.
rounds.explanation: The innocent puppy just wanted to play.
